accounting_definitions_verified: lifetime_bankroll: STARTING_BANKROLL + total_realized_pnl() — full lifetime DB query, no date cap
capital_committed: SUM(entry_px * qty WHERE status='open') — live DB query
live_equity: SUM(qty * current_price) where current_price = held token best_bid — verified held-side
unrealized_pnl: (current_price - entry_px) * qty per open trade — clearly separated from realized
session_baseline: _session_start_ts = int(time.time()) — in-memory global, no DB write

accounting_definitions_fixed.after: max(0.0, STARTING_BANKROLL - committed) with WARNING log when overcommitted

accounting_definitions_fixed.before: sum(d['pnl'] for d in _daily_pnl_history()) — LIMIT 30 days, would miss history beyond 30 trading days
accounting_definitions_fixed.after: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usd),0) FROM trades WHERE status='closed' — full lifetime query

invariants_enforced: NO_DOUBLE_COUNTING: confirmed — open/closed queries never mixed
AVAILABLE_CASH_NEVER_NEGATIVE: fixed — clamped to max(0, ...) + WARNING
LIVE_EQUITY_USES_HELD_SIDE_PRICE: confirmed — asset_id = held token, current_price = best_bid
SESSION_BASELINE_IS_SNAPSHOT: confirmed — in-memory only, no DB write
